evals.prompt: Configure caching in Next.js App Router
evals.expected_output: Static: fetch(url, { cache: 'force-cache' }); Dynamic: fetch(url, { cache: 'no-store' }); Revalidated: fetch(url, { next: { revalidate: 60 } }); Next.js 16+: use 'use cache' directive instead of unstable_cache

evals.prompt: Use revalidateTag for cache invalidation in Next.js
evals.expected_output: Tag fetches: fetch(url, { next: { tags: ['posts'] } }); invalidate from Server Action: revalidateTag('posts'); triggers background revalidation; prefer over revalidatePath for fine-grained control

evals.prompt: Understand the 4 caching layers in Next.js
evals.expected_output: 1. Request Memoization: React cache() deduplicates per-request; 2. Data Cache: 'use cache'/revalidateTag; 3. Full Route Cache: static HTML prerendering; 4. Router Cache: client-side prefetch store

async function getPosts() { 'use cache'; cacheLife('hours'); cacheTag('posts'); return db.posts.findMany(); }; replaces unstable_cache; attach tags for revalidation; use updateTag() for sync invalidation

evals.prompt: Prevent stale data in a Next.js app
evals.expected_output: After mutation Server Action call: revalidatePath('/posts') for full route or revalidateTag('posts') for tagged data; router.refresh() only for Router Cache (client-side); don't rely on cache: 'no-store' globally

evals.prompt: Set up PPR with Suspense and caching in Next.js
evals.expected_output: Enable experimental.ppr: 'incremental'; export const experimental_ppr = true in page; static layout renders instantly; wrap dynamic user data in <Suspense fallback={<Skeleton/>}>; add 'use cache' on static data functions

should_not_trigger: Redis caching strategy in NestJS with CacheModule
Cache-aside pattern in Laravel with Cache::remember
HTTP caching headers in a Go HTTP server
Varnish cache configuration for a PHP site
